top_signals.title: Bond Yield Surge Poses Threat to Asia’s AI-Fueled Stock Rally
top_signals.summary: Rising US bond yields pose a threat to Asia’s stock rally, as growing inflation fears offset ongoing optimism over benefits from the artificial intelligence boom.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Standard Chartered to cut 15% of back-office jobs as AI use escalates
top_signals.summary: Bill Winters’ new strategy aims to ‘drive sustainable growth’ at Asia-focused lender
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
